summary.zh-CN: 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
summary.en: Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.

bodyHtml.zh-CN:
产品改进

模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力

  • 变更说明: 增强了模型、提示词和 AI Provider 相关能力，让配置和使用方式更完整。
  • 影响范围: 影响 提示词与任务引导、hagicode-core 相关功能、ai 相关功能。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

会话、消息和运行状态相关体验

  • 变更说明: 增强了会话、消息和运行状态相关体验，让上下文查看与过程反馈更清晰。
  • 影响范围: 影响 会话流程、Web 客户端流程、分布式会话运行时。
  • 使用方式: 继续使用现有入口即可，升级到该版本后相关改进会自动生效。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

项目、仓库和工作区相关操作

  • 变更说明: 改进了项目、仓库和工作区相关操作，提升代码定位与切换效率。
  • 影响范围: 影响 提示词与任务引导、ai 相关功能、Web 客户端流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

问题修复

整理了配置与接口配套细节

  • 变更说明: 整理了配置与接口配套细节，减少功能落地过程中的兼容性问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 ai 相关功能、Web 客户端流程、提示词与任务引导。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。

引导与浮层交互细节

  • 变更说明: 优化了引导与浮层交互细节，减少遮挡和操作中断的问题。
  • 影响范围: 影响 配置行为、ai 相关功能、Web 客户端流程。
  • 使用方式: 继续通过原有功能入口使用即可，本版本安装后会直接带来相关行为更新。
  • 注意事项: 该领域还包含部分底层整理类提交，但发布说明只保留对用户可感知结果有帮助的内容。
bodyHtml.en:
Product Improvements

Model

  • Change Summary: Enhanced model, prompt, and AI provider capabilities to make configuration and usage more complete.
  • Impact: Affects shared UI components, Conversation, prompt and task guidance.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Session

  • Change Summary: Enhanced session, message, and runtime visibility to make context and progress easier to follow.
  • Impact: Affects session workflows, web client flows, distributed session runtime.
  • How to Use: Keep using the existing session entry points; the improved behavior appears automatically after upgrading to this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Project

  • Change Summary: Improved project, repository, and workspace actions to make code access and switching more efficient.
  • Impact: Affects prompt and task guidance, shared UI components, Conversation.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Fixes

Cleaned up configuration

  • Change Summary: Cleaned up configuration and API details to reduce compatibility issues around feature rollout.
  • Impact: Affects Ai, Tool Calls.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.

Guide and overlay behavior

  • Change Summary: Refined guide and overlay behavior to reduce layering issues and interrupted interactions.
  • Impact: Affects configuration behavior.
  • How to Use: Use the existing entry points for the affected feature; the updated behavior is available after installing this version.
  • Notes: Some supporting commits in this area are infrastructural, but the published note keeps the wording focused on user-visible outcomes.
